title: lotus hamatus
intro: Lotus hamatus, also known as the Lotus or Kamala, is a plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions in Asia and Australia, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lotus hamatus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, Lotus hamatus is often used as a powder or tea, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
